name: @samchon/evidence-graph
description: Evidence-graph lint contributor for @ttsc/lint: declare provenance with a JSDoc @evidence tag and fail the build when it is missing or dangling.

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const file of ['LICENSE', 'README.md']) fs.copyFileSync('../../' + file, file)" && pnpm run build
scripts.postpack: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); for (const file of ['LICENSE', 'README.md']) fs.rmSync(file, { force: true })"

author: Jeongho Nam
